title: Mark Mccoy
compiled_truth: Mark Mccoy is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-05-23 to 2001-06-12), Mark Mccoy sent 68 and received 166 emails, totalling 234 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (59), [Stacey Neuweiler](people/stacey-neuweiler) (25), [Pat Clynes](people/pat-clynes) (15), [Edward Terry](people/edward-terry) (9), [Sabrae Zajac](people/sabrae-zajac) (8).
